Worldwide Box Office $43,980,363
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $21,672,679

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: February 29th, 2008 (Wide) by New Line
Video Release: June 3rd, 2008 by New Line Home Video
MPA Rating: R for language and some sexual content.
Running Time: 91 minutes
Plot point: Basketball, Heaven and Hell, Plagiarism, Singers, Songwriter, Underdog
Social setting: Slobs vs. Snobs
Subgenre: Sports Comedy
Time period setting: 1970s
Source:Original Screenplay

Production Method:Live Action

Production/Financing Companies: Mosaic Media
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
